# Windows-path semantics node IDs.
# Ubuntu Python suite: --deselect each line.
# Windows micro-job (#24): --select / explicit node-id list from this same file.
# Single source so select/deselect cannot drift.
#
# Issue #21 listed hooks/blocking/test_gh_artifact_upload.py; the real path is
# packages/claude-dev-env/scripts/tests/test_gh_artifact_upload.py (amended here).
